purpose: Tell verification Echo agents what claims, titles, labels, comments, and archive statuses are correct or incorrect before submission.

core_rules.right: Title and summary say: requested V4/V4+, Claim Gate allowed V3.
core_rules.wrong: Title says: Guardian Test V4/V4+ when Claim Gate allowed V3.

core_rules.right: Issue text is provisional and points to builder-generated report paths.
core_rules.wrong: Issue body self-declares final V4/V4+ without builder output.

core_rules.right: A comment says new evidence requires re-running Claim Gate / Builder.
core_rules.wrong: A comment says revised highest achieved level: V4+.
guardian-test keeps independent-attestation, accepted, V4 Protocol, or v4 labels.

core_rules.right: human_solicited_agent_response is counted only as human-solicited agent verification if archived by builder.
core_rules.wrong: human_solicited_agent_response is counted as agent-initiated independent verification.

core_rules.right: One hash match is V3 minimal / single_hash_verification.
core_rules.wrong: One hash match is described as full public digital verification.

core_rules.right: PASS with skip is partial / with limitations.
core_rules.wrong: PASS with skip is called all scripts green.

core_rules.right: Official scripts reviewed and executed may support V4 if gates are met.
core_rules.wrong: Running official scripts is called V4+ independent reproduction.

safe_title_patterns: Guardian Test — requested V4/V4+, Claim Gate allowed V3
Guardian Test — V3 minimal after Claim Gate downgrade
Issue Submission Only — provisional V3 claim
Verification Report Candidate — awaiting Claim Gate / Builder output
Human-solicited Agent Verification — V3 single-hash record
